skill2: Relax: Incoming healing ▲ 4.06% continuously. Stacks up to 20 times.
Attract: Taunts all enemies for 5 sec.
Restores HP equal to 5.23% of the skill user's final Max HP.

caveats: ⚑ skill1 ATK buff is kit-scoped to 'allies who previously used their Burst Skills' (bursters only); the schema has no burst-status target, so it is applied to ALL allies here — over-credits any non-bursting damage dealer. reloadSpeedPct 44.35 legitimately covers ALL allies (both kit branches grant it), so that block is exact.
⚑ skill1 DEF buff is kit-scoped to non-bursters; applied to all allies as a stand-in. defPct is offensively inert in v1, so the mis-scope moves no damage — kept for completeness.

⚑ skill2 damage buff cadence (hitCount 860) is a DERIVED estimate: 43 normal attacks/stack × 20 stacks to max Relax → consume → heal → the ally Attack Damage buff fires. The Relax/heal/invuln/taunt chain itself is inert and unmodeled; only its net firing cadence and the 20.99% ally buff are represented. 7s duration vs the ~860-hit refill period is unverified — measure MG uptime before trusting.
⚑ burst shield (maxHpPct 10.45) is offensively inert (no HP pool) but retained: it emits a shield event that may drive a teammate's shield-synergy trigger.
override.note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Crown (crown) is a MG/Iron/Defender/Burst II support with ZERO self-damage kit lines — her own damage is pure MG weapon fire (normalAttackMultiplier 5.57). Damage-relevant kit output: skill1 casterAtkPct 64.51% to bursting allies at Full-Burst start (flat ATK add, biggest lever) + reloadSpeedPct 44.35% to all allies (shot-count uptime); skill2 team Attack Damage ▲20.99% on the long Relax cycle; burst team Attack Damage ▲36.24% + a shield. Burst-status target scoping and the Relax cadence are the two load-bearing approximations — see caveats.

audit.effectOrReason: casterAtkPct 64.51 durationSec 15; target 'bursters' approximated as allies (⚑ over-credit)
reloadSpeedPct 44.35 durationSec 15 to allies (both branches grant it → exact)
defPct 37.44 durationSec 15; inert in v1, target approximated as allies
folded into the single all-allies reloadSpeedPct block above
Incoming-healing buff — no StatKey, offensively inert; drives the cycle cadence only (see hitCount 860)
self-heal, inert (no HP pool); it is the trigger source for the ally buff below
attackDamagePct 20.99 durationSec 7 to allies; trigger 'when recovery takes effect' modeled as hitCount 860 (43×20 Relax cycle) ⚑
attackDamagePct 36.24 durationSec 15 to allies, trigger burstCast
shield maxHpPct 10.45 durationSec 15; inert offensively, retained for shield-synergy triggers

flags.reasoning: Kit scopes this ATK buff to 'allies who previously used their Burst Skills'; the TargetDef schema has no burst-status target. Applied to all allies, which over-credits any non-bursting damage dealer.
flags.recipe: Verify in a graded comp whether all damage dealers burst before Crown's FB start; if a non-burster carries, this line over-reads and needs a per-comp burster set. Confirm via rotation log.

flags.estimate: casterAtkPct feeds flat ATK = 64.51% × Crown's own ATK
flags.reasoning: 'of the skill user's ATK' → flat add scaled by CASTER ATK, not the target's own ATK (that would be atkPct).
flags.recipe: Confirm the flat-ATK path in the buff engine; measure an ally's popup jump at FB start against 0.6451×Crown ATK.

flags.reasoning: The 20.99% ally buff fires 'when recovery takes effect', which only happens at max Relax (20 stacks × 43 attacks each), then Relax resets. Net firing cadence ≈ 860 owner normal-attack hits. Engine cannot chain the Relax→heal→buff sequence natively.
flags.recipe: Count Crown's MG hits-to-max in footage; measure how many times the 20.99% ally buff appears in a 180s fight and how much of that window it holds (7s vs refill period).

flags.reasoning: If 860 hits take >7s the buff is intermittent (low uptime); if <7s it is effectively continuous. MG wind-up + fire rate unknown here.
flags.recipe: Derive from Crown's measured MG cadence at scope lock; compare refill period to 7s to set effective uptime.

flags.field: burst shield / skill2 heal offensive value
flags.reasoning: No HP pool in v1; shield/heal/invuln/taunt produce no damage directly. Retained for kit completeness and possible teammate shield-synergy triggers.
flags.recipe: Only becomes load-bearing if a teammate carries a 'shielded'/on-recovery damage trigger; check team composition.
